name: @sextant/dash-bundle
description: Build-only scope (ADR-0044): the dependency root scripts/build-dash-ui.sh bundles the dash browser bundle (vendor/sextant-bus.js) from. It depends on the three local TS packages the browser dash runs over its own bus Client — @sextant/sdk (browser entry), @sextant/conv-goals, @sextant/conv-review — and nats.ws (the wss transport). Not published; the bundle output is gitignored like the *.js JSX outputs.
